message:
chore(beads): mark WAITAOF fsync-always gating bead in progress (frankenredis-ruvt)

Flip frankenredis-ruvt (redis parity: WAITAOF appendfsync-always
local fsync gating) from open to in_progress so br ready stops
surfacing it while an agent is actively aligning the local fsync
gating with upstream Redis semantics.

Pure issue-tracker bookkeeping — no source code changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
